response.global_summary: The video features a virtual, competitive game segment between several Hololive VTubers (Hakos Baelz, Kobo Kanaeru, Ceres Fauna, and Tokoyami Towa). They are competing in a game called 'Physical Autofister' (as seen on the on-screen watermark), which involves a series of physical challenges. The video has no official song performance, but rather contains background music throughout the game segments. Based on the audio and video, there is no recognizable commercially released vocal song being performed or played as a primary feature. Therefore, no song metadata or lyrics could be resolved.

scenes.description: The video starts with an introduction of the VTubers, setting the stage for their 'Physical Autofister' game. Background music is playing but it is not a recognizable vocal song.
The game begins. VTubers are competing in a challenge, moving their avatars on a stage. Background music continues. No vocal songs detected.
The video concludes with a closing segment where the VTubers talk to the audience and say their final goodbyes. The background music fades out. No vocal songs detected.
